records.question: Which tracks named Revolta Olodum are MPEG audio files that are at least 230191 milliseconds long, have at least 7557065 bytes, cost at least 0.99, and appear on invoice lines with unit prices of at least 0.99 and quantities of at most 1?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT track.trackid FROM track
JOIN invoiceline ON track.trackid = invoiceline.trackid
JOIN mediatype ON track.mediatypeid = mediatype.mediatypeid
WHERE track.milliseconds >= 230191 AND track.name = 'Revolta Olodum' AND invoiceline.unitprice >= 0.99 AND track.bytes >= 7557065 AND mediatype.name = 'MPEG audio file' AND track.unitprice >= 0.99 AND invoiceline.quantity <= 1
records.pred_sql:
SELECT track.TrackId
FROM Track AS track
JOIN MediaType AS media ON track.MediaTypeId = media.MediaTypeId
JOIN InvoiceLine AS invoiceLine ON track.TrackId = invoiceLine.TrackId
WHERE track.Name = 'Revolta Olodum'
  AND media.Name = 'MPEG audio'
  AND track.Milliseconds >= 230191
  AND track.Bytes >= 7557065
  AND track.UnitPrice >= 0.99
  AND invoiceLine.UnitPrice >= 0.99
  AND invoiceLine.Quantity <= 1

records.question: Which tracks named Alive by Stone Gossard cost at most 0.99, are no more than 11176623 bytes in file size, last at least 341080 milliseconds, and are in the MPEG audio file format?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT track.trackid FROM track
JOIN mediatype ON track.mediatypeid = mediatype.mediatypeid
WHERE track.unitprice <= 0.99 AND track.bytes <= 11176623 AND track.name = 'Alive' AND track.milliseconds >= 341080 AND mediatype.name = 'MPEG audio file' AND track.composer = 'Stone Gossard'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT track.TrackId 
FROM Track track 
JOIN Album album ON track.AlbumId = album.AlbumId 
JOIN Artist artist ON album.ArtistId = artist.ArtistId 
JOIN MediaType mediaType ON track.MediaTypeId = mediaType.MediaTypeId 
WHERE track.Name = 'Alive' 
AND artist.Name = 'Stone Gossard' 
AND track.UnitPrice <= 0.99 
AND track.Bytes <= 11176623 
AND track.Milliseconds >= 341080 
AND mediaType.Name = 'MPEG audio'

records.question: Which tracks named Gates Of Tomorrow on the album Dance Of Death cost at most $0.99 and have a file size of at most 12482688 bytes?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT track.trackid FROM track
JOIN invoiceline ON track.trackid = invoiceline.trackid
JOIN album ON track.albumid = album.albumid
WHERE track.unitprice <= 0.99 AND track.name = 'Gates Of Tomorrow' AND album.title = 'Dance Of Death' AND track.bytes <= 12482688
records.pred_sql:
SELECT track.TrackId 
FROM Track AS track 
JOIN Album AS album ON track.AlbumId = album.AlbumId 
WHERE track.Name = 'Gates Of Tomorrow' 
AND album.Title = 'Dance Of Death' 
AND track.UnitPrice <= 0.99 
AND track.Bytes <= 12482688

records.question: Can you find the track Everything's Ruined from the album Angel Dust by Faith No More that has a length of exactly 273658 milliseconds, a size of exactly 9010917 bytes, and a unit price of exactly 0.99?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT track.trackid FROM track
JOIN album ON track.albumid = album.albumid
JOIN artist ON album.artistid = artist.artistid
WHERE track.milliseconds = 273658 AND track.bytes = 9010917 AND artist.name = 'Faith No More' AND track.unitprice = 0.99 AND track.name = 'Everything''s Ruined' AND album.title = 'Angel Dust'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT track.TrackId FROM Track track 
JOIN Album album ON track.AlbumId = album.AlbumId 
JOIN Artist artist ON album.ArtistId = artist.ArtistId 
WHERE track.Name = "Everything's Ruined" 
AND album.Title = "Angel Dust" 
AND artist.Name = "Faith No More" 
AND track.Milliseconds = 273658 
AND track.Bytes = 9010917 
AND track.UnitPrice = 0.99

records.question: What tracks are exactly 358948 milliseconds long and are Rock genre?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT track.trackid FROM track
JOIN invoiceline ON track.trackid = invoiceline.trackid
JOIN genre ON track.genreid = genre.genreid
WHERE track.milliseconds = 358948 AND genre.name = 'Rock'
records.pred_sql: SELECT track.TrackId FROM Track track JOIN Genre genre ON track.GenreId = genre.GenreId WHERE track.Milliseconds = 358948 AND genre.Name = 'Rock'
